notes: Power zones map investor persona frameworks to the company types where each framework has demonstrated alpha. Rules match against registry classification fields (archetype, moat, dhando, investment_sleeve, cycle, stance). A ticker is in a persona's power zone when at least min_matches rule fields match and no exclusion fires. build_power_zones.py blends rule fit with persona_calibration.json match rates.

scarce_strategic_asset.label: Scarce strategic asset owner
scarce_strategic_asset.warning: Acreage or infrastructure ownership alone is insufficient; leveraged merchant assets and sponsor-controlled structures require security-specific debt and economic-claim adjustments.

quality_reinvestment.label: High-return compounder
quality_reinvestment.warning: Historical growth is not a valuation driver unless retained capital and incremental returns reconcile.

capital_cycle.label: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
capital_cycle.warning: Peak earnings and replacement cost are not sustainable value without a supply-response and cost-of-capital test.

credit_and_normalized_returns.label: Credit, funding, and normalized returns
credit_and_normalized_returns.warning: Regulatory capital and gross asset value are not freely distributable shareholder value.

catalyst_asset_value.label: Catalyst-backed asset value
catalyst_asset_value.warning: Asset value belongs in the base case only when a credible catalyst, beneficiary, and realization path exist.

predictable_cash_flow.label: Predictable cash-flow security
predictable_cash_flow.warning: A stable dividend does not prove sustainable earning power or eliminate funding and dilution risk.

binary_milestone.label: Binary and milestone-driven assets
binary_milestone.warning: Probability, time, remaining cash burn, and dilution must be explicit for every asset.

pabrai.label: Mohnish Pabrai
pabrai.framework: Dhandho: low-risk high-uncertainty bets, low-cost commodity producers, deep value asymmetry

hohn.label: Chris Hohn
hohn.framework: TCI: concentrated large-cap quality with irreplaceable infrastructure-like moats

buffett_weschler.label: Buffett / Weschler
buffett_weschler.framework: Durable moats at fair prices, owner-operator capital allocation, financial strength

greenblatt.label: Joel Greenblatt
greenblatt.framework: Special situations: spin-offs, restructurings, cheap quality via magic-formula economics

munger.label: Charlie Munger
munger.framework: Few great businesses held forever; pay up for quality with pricing power

hk.label: Horizon Kinetics
hk.framework: Hard assets, owner-operators, croupiers and inflation beneficiaries with long-duration optionality

stahl.label: Murray Stahl
stahl.framework: Royalty and toll-booth economics on scarce assets; anti-indexation positioning

lawrence.label: Bryan Lawrence
lawrence.framework: Oakcliff: concentrated positions in predictable cash generators trading below intrinsic value

moi.label: MOI / Mihaljevic
moi.framework: Global deep value and hidden-asset situations off the beaten path

marathon_capital_cycle.label: Marathon / Capital Returns
marathon_capital_cycle.framework: Supply response, industry capacity, replacement economics, and reinvestment-cycle mistakes

marks_credit_cycle.label: Howard Marks / Oaktree
marks_credit_cycle.framework: Leverage, refinancing, cycle position, liquidity, and downside under stress

klarman_asset_value.label: Klarman / Baupost
klarman_asset_value.framework: Catalyst-backed asset value, conservative NAV, realization friction, and downside recovery
